purpose: Turn Refactor from passive review into small, measurable website improvements.
rules: Availability, stability and functionality come before cleanup.
Broad restructuring is allowed only with Master Controller approval, rollback note and quality gates.
Each Refactor task must name before/after benefit and validation.
Prefer one website flow at a time: music, booking, newsletter, VIP/auth, stats.

opportunities.evidence: 6 website service files contain fetch/base-url handling.
opportunities.action: Move base URL resolution and safe JSON/error reading into one small helper, then migrate one user flow at a time.
opportunities.validation: Run the touched flow test plus npm run build. For visible flows, add desktop/mobile proof before release.

opportunities.evidence: Audio and stats runtime URL logic are split across playback and stats modules.
opportunities.action: Keep localhost/production routing in a shared utility so local listening does not pollute production stats.
opportunities.validation: Run AudioContext and MusicSection tests, then npm run build.

opportunities.action: Extract only the next user-visible or service-flow subunit that can receive a focused test.
opportunities.validation: Run the nearest component/unit test plus npm run build.
